title: hieracium misaucinum subsp. rhenosilvanum
intro: Hieracium misaucinum subsp. rhenosilvanum, also known as Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, and its roots are used to prepare herbal remedies. The health benefits of Hawkweed include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in the healing of wounds and reducing pain. In herbal preparations, the roots of Hawkweed can be dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
